id: bigtech:shock from iran war has trumps vision for us energy dominanc:2026-04-12T11:17:26.000Z
title: Shock from Iran war has Trump's vision for US energy dominance flailing
author: Marianne Lavalle, Inside Climate News
summary_long: In President Donald Trump’s telling, the United States has fuel enough to hover above the chaos that his attack on Iran has triggered in global energy markets. “We’re in great shape for the future,” Trump said in a speech last week, asserting that this nation, as the world’s biggest oil and gas producer, doesn’t rely on the tankers Iran blocked from passage through the Strait of Hormuz for the past month. “We don’t need anything they have.” But the view is much different beneath the service station signs across the country that have flipped to more than $4 per gallon for the first time in four years. Over the past month, US households paid $8.4 billion more for gasoline compared to prices before the war on Iran began, according to a report by Democrats on Congress’ Joint Economic Committee. Source: arstechnica.com. Date: 2026-04-12. Why it matters: outline likely impact on technology, business, or society.

id: consumer:openai says elon musk is orchestrating a lastminute legal am:2026-04-12T16:32:48.000Z
title: OpenAI says Elon Musk is orchestrating a last-minute 'legal ambush' before trial
author: Jackson Chen
summary_long: The feud between Elon Musk and OpenAI is getting even more contentious as the two sides get ready for trial later this month. The latest development in the legal back-and-forth saw OpenAI accuse Elon Musk and his latest proposals as a "legal ambush," as first reported by Bloomberg. OpenAI filed its response on Friday, which detailed that Musk was "sandbagging the defendants and injecting chaos into the proceedings, while trying to recast his public narrative about his lawsuit." The lawsuit dates back to 2024 when Elon Musk sued both OpenAI and Microsoft, accusing the AI giant of ditching its original mission of being a non-profit and instead converting into a for-profit business after receiving financial backing and forming a partnership with Microsoft. Prior to OpenAI's latest filing, Musk amended his original complaint to instead award any damages received to OpenAI's nonprofit arm instead. Source: www.engadget.com. Date: 2026-04-12. Why it matters: outline likely impact on technology, business, or society.

id: consumer:apple reportedly testing out four different styles for its s:2026-04-12T20:05:50.000Z
title: Apple reportedly testing out four different styles for its smart glasses that will rival Meta Ray-Bans
author: Jackson Chen
summary_long: Apple may be late to the smart glasses market, but it could be covering all its bases with up to four potential styles for its upcoming product. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, Apple could launch some or all of the four styles it's currently testing for its smart glasses. Gurman reported Apple is testing out a large rectangular frame that's comparable to Ray-Ban Wayfarers, a slimmer rectangular design like the glasses that Apple CEO Tim Cook wears, a larger oval or circular frame and a smaller oval or circle option. Apple is also working on a range of colors, including black, ocean blue and light brown, according to Bloomberg. Source: www.engadget.com. Date: 2026-04-12. Why it matters: outline likely impact on technology, business, or society. What’s next: note near-term developments or signals to watch.

id: consumer:the us government wants reddit to snitch on one of its users:2026-04-12T19:05:32.000Z
title: The US government wants Reddit to snitch on one of its users through a grand jury
author: Jackson Chen
summary_long: Immigration and Customs Enforcement has a certain Redditor in its crosshairs and it's now strong-arming the social media platform to reveal who they are with a grand jury subpoena, according to a report from The Intercept. The nonprofit news outlet was able to obtain the subpoena that ordered Reddit to provide info on one of its users who's been accused of criticizing ICE by April 14. According to the report, ICE has been trying to identify this Redditor for a month without success. More specifically, Reddit is being asked to give up the user's name, address, phone number and other personal data. Source: www.engadget.com. Date: 2026-04-12. Why it matters: outline likely impact on technology, business, or society. What’s next: note near-term developments or signals to watch.

id: nextfrontiers:ai models can fake visual understanding of images that dont :2026-04-12T17:00:02.000Z
title: AI models can fake visual understanding of images that don't exist
summary_long: It wasn't long ago that news headlines claimed that AI might soon assist radiologists in interpreting X-rays of broken bones and analyzing mammograms. We are still far from the destination, as a new study has brought to light the mirage effect, where AI creates detailed descriptions of images that do not exist. Source: techxplore.com. Date: 2026-04-12. Why it matters: outline likely impact on technology, business, or society. What’s next: note near-term developments or signals to watch.

summary_long: Not long ago, if you needed a speech polished, a document translated or a logo designed, you would probably have hired a freelancer online. Millions of people did exactly that.
